en: Is this... hair?
Struggling is pointless. Huh?
I know why you're here, and I'm not afraid of you.
ko: 네가 왜 왔는지 알아, 무섭지 않아.

en: What?
Who are you, and how did you find me?
ko: 넌 누구야, 어떻게 날 찾은 거야?

en: Ah. Who are you, and how did you find me?
ko: 아. 넌 누구야, 어떻게 날 찾은 거야?

en: I know not who you are, nor how I came to find you, but may I just say...
ko: 누구인지도 어떻게 찾았는지도 모르겠지만, 한 마디만...

en: Hi.
How you doing? The name's Flynn Rider.
How's your day going? Huh?
Who else knows my location, Flynn Rider?
ko: 내 위치를 또 누가 알아, 플린 라이더?

en: All right, Blondie. Rapunzel. Gesundheit. Here's the deal.
ko: 좋아, 금발 아가씨. 라푼젤. 건강해라. 상황이 이렇다.

en: I was in a situation, gallivanting through the forest.
ko: 쫓기는 중이었고, 탑이 보여서 올라간 거야. 끝.

en: I came across your tower, and the... Oh, oh no. Where is my satchel?
ko: 아, 안 돼. 가방은 어디 있지?

en: I've hidden it. Somewhere you'll never find it.
It's in that pot, isn't it?
Oh. Huh?
Would you stop that?
Now it's hidden, where you'll never find it.
ko: 이번엔 진짜 못 찾을 곳에 숨겼어.

en: So, what do you want with my hair?
To cut it? What? Sell it?
No! Listen, the only thing I want to do with your hair is to get out of it.
ko: 아니! 들어봐, 네 머리카락에서 벗어나고 싶을 뿐이야.

en: Literally. Wait. You don't want my hair?
ko: 말 그대로. 잠깐. 내 머리카락이 필요 없다고?

en: Why on earth would I want your hair?
Look, I was being chased, I saw a tower, I climbed it. End of story.
ko: 봐, 쫓기고 있었고, 탑이 보여서 올라갔어. 끝.

en: You're telling the truth? Yes.
I know I need someone to take me.
I think he's telling the truth, too. Doesn't have fangs.
ko: 진실을 말하는 것 같기도 해. 이빨도 없고.

en: But what choice do I have?
Okay, Flynn Rider, I'm prepared to offer you a deal.
Look this way. Do you know what these are?
You mean the lantern thing they do for the princess?
Lanterns. I knew they weren't stars.
Well, tomorrow evening, they will light the night sky with these lanterns.
ko: 내일 저녁, 이 등불로 밤하늘을 밝힐 거야.

en: You will act as my guide, take me to these lanterns, and return me home safely.
ko: 안내를 맡아서 등불을 보여주고 안전하게 집에 데려다줘.

en: Then, and only then, will I return your satchel to you.
That is my deal. Yeah. No can do.
Unfortunately, the kingdom and I aren't exactly simpatico at the moment,
ko: 불행히도 왕국과 나는 지금 좀 안 맞아서,

en: so I won't be taking you anywhere.
Something brought you here, Flynn Rider.
ko: 뭔가가 널 여기로 이끌었어, 플린 라이더.

en: Call it what you will, fate, destiny. A horse.
So I have made the decision to trust you. A horrible decision, Rian.
ko: 그래서 널 믿기로 했어. 끔찍한 결정이지만.

en: But trust me when I tell you this.
You can tear this tower apart brick by brick,
ko: 이 탑을 벽돌 하나하나 뜯어낸다 해도,

en: but without my help, you will never find your precious satchel.
ko: 내 도움 없이는 소중한 가방을 절대 못 찾을 거야.

en: Let me just get this straight.
I take you to see the lanterns, bring you back home, and you'll give me back my satchel?
ko: 등불 보러 데려가고, 집에 데려다주면, 가방을 주겠다고?

en: I promise.
And when I promise something, I never, ever break that promise.
ko: 내가 약속하면, 절대, 절대 안 깨.

en: Ever. Ever.
All right, listen. I didn't want to have to do this, but you leave me no choice.
ko: 좋아, 들어봐. 이러고 싶지 않았는데, 넌 나한테 선택의 여지를 안 줬어.

en: Here comes the smolder.
This is kind of an off day for me. This doesn't normally happen.
ko: 오늘은 좀 컨디션이 안 좋아서. 원래 이러진 않아.

en: Fine, I'll take you to see the lanterns. Really?
Oops. You broke my smolder.
